overview: I built a conversation history manager and feature spec generator using the Claude API, learning hands-on how tokens, context windows, and prompting techniques shape AI product design.

keyPoints.title: Hit 30K token rate limit intentionally on experiment 4
'McKinsey-style' anchor beat 4 other prompts, fewer tokens
AI marginal cost is predictable tokens per user, not near-zero
Q&A step before 4,000-token spec cut hallucination noticeably
Claude backed down immediately — sycophancy is a reliability risk
